titles.en: Qur'an's past, future, and present guidance
Qur'an's past, future, and present guidance

segments: ٣١٣. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): وَفِي الْقرْآنِ نَبَأُ مَا قَبْلَكُمْ، وَخَبَرُ مَا بَعْدَكُمْ، وَحُكْمُ مَا بَيْنَكُمْ.
arabic.text: ٣١٣. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): وَفِي الْقرْآنِ نَبَأُ مَا قَبْلَكُمْ، وَخَبَرُ مَا بَعْدَكُمْ، وَحُكْمُ مَا بَيْنَكُمْ.

segments: 313. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: The Qur’ān contains news about the past, foretellings about the future and commandments for the present.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 313. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: The Qur’ān contains news about the past, foretellings about the future and commandments for the present.
